role_adherence_notes.linguistic: Correctly identified lack of visible text; stayed within domain.
role_adherence_notes.landscape: Focused on terrain, vegetation, and settlement patterns.
role_adherence_notes.botanics: Analyzed plant species (Prunus) and biome types.
role_adherence_notes.regulatory: Analyzed infrastructure standards (poles, fences, road surfaces).
role_adherence_notes.meta: Synthesized cross-domain cues (architecture, utility pole design) to distinguish regions.

verdict.overall_verdict_notes: The pipeline correctly identified the country (Romania) by leveraging the meta and landscape agents' strong visual evidence regarding infrastructure and settlement patterns, despite the linguistic agent having no data.

visual_consistency_notes.landscape: Descriptions of dirt roads, fences, and trees match the image perfectly.
visual_consistency_notes.botanics: Identification of deciduous trees and garden plots is consistent with the image.
visual_consistency_notes.regulatory: Descriptions of concrete poles and metal fencing are accurate.
visual_consistency_notes.meta: Synthesis of visual cues (poles, fences) is grounded in the image.
